description: A new parent wants to know the correct way to install a child safety seat in their new SUV.

nodes.task_description: Access the vehicle's owner's manual to locate the LATCH anchor points.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds the diagram showing the anchor point locations in the second-row seats.

nodes.task_description: Explain the location of the LATCH anchors and strongly recommend that the customer also consult the child seat manufacturer's instructions and have the installation checked by a certified technician.

expected_outcome.value: Agent provides helpful information but also includes a critical safety disclaimer and recommendation.
